title: alnus japonica f. serrata
intro: Alnus japonica f. serrata, also known as the Japanese alder or serrated alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the birch family (Betulaceae). Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus japonica f. serrata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Alnus japonica f. serrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
